articles.title: Dumb Co dared me to trade my iPhone for a hacked flip phone
articles.description: Dumb Co sells flip phones that sync to your smartphone, bridging the infinite connectivity of the iPhone and the unrealistic limitations of an early 2000s relic.

articles.title: Oratomic raises $300M to build a viable quantum computer that needs only 20K qubits
articles.description: The massive round was co-led by ARCH Venture Partners, Spark Capital, and Khosla Ventures.

articles.title: Netflix could be planning ‘always-on’ live TV channels
articles.description: Amid signs of slowing engagement, Netflix is reportedly considering launching "always-on" live channels, giving subscribers something to tune into 24/7.

articles.title: EU threatens Meta with fines over addictive features on Facebook and Instagram
articles.description: The tech giant is in breach of the Digital Services Act by focusing on features like infinite scroll, autoplay, push notifications, and the highly personalized recommendation algorithms, the European Commission said.

articles.title: Florida ransomware negotiator convicted for helping ransomware gang extort US companies
articles.description: A third ransomware negotiator has been jailed for helping a notorious ransomware group extort American victim companies into paying the hackers.

articles.title: After Apple, India’s smartphone manufacturing boom enters new phase with Vivo JV
articles.description: Vivo's joint venture could become a template for Chinese smartphone makers in India.

articles.title: OpenAI says GPT 5.6 is the ‘preferred model’ for Microsoft Copilot 365 amid breakup chatter
articles.description: OpenAI's new family of models will continue to power Microsoft's suite of workplace and productivity apps.

articles.title: Don’t want to invest in Elon Musk? Two new ETFs explicitly exclude him
articles.description: The new exchange-traded funds exclude companies that are founded, controlled, or led by Elon Musk. That means no SpaceX or Tesla.

articles.title: Fidji Simo steps down from OpenAI’s No. 2 role
articles.description: OpenAI's No. 2 executive, Fidji Simo, is stepping down from her full-time role after her medical leave proved longer than expected — a leadership vacuum that comes at a tricky time as the company eyes a possible IPO and races to catch Anthropic in the enterprise market.

articles.title: OpenAI launches its new family of models with GPT-5.6
articles.description: OpenAI's latest family of models promises improvements across a range of areas, including cybersecurity.

articles.title: An AI agent startup just let its agent run its $100M fundraise
articles.description: Lyzr, a startup that builds AI agents for enterprises, used its own AI agent to raise a $100 million round — proof, evidently, that the product actually works.

articles.title: OpenAI is shutting down Atlas, but its AI browser ambitions are still growing
articles.description: OpenAI is sunsetting its AI-powered browser after less than a year. But it's moving some agentic browsing features to its desktop app and a Chrome extension.

articles.title: Elon Musk praises Mythos/Fable, promises not to ‘cut off’ Anthropic
articles.description: Should Anthropic trust Elon Musk to host its models? With about $40 billion in revenue at stake, Musk insists that the company can.

articles.title: Can AI answer the $3 trillion question?
articles.description: The AI ROI debate has returned and the numbers are even bigger, as are, perhaps, the consequences.

articles.title: Meta enters the crowded AI coding battle with Muse Spark 1.1
articles.description: Meta's pitch to users is Spark's ability to handle large agentic workloads, fix bugs, and help with large code migrations — the kind of automation that enterprises are increasingly turning to AI companies to provide.

articles.title: Charles Hudson shares the common mistakes he’s seen after investing in 500+ startups
articles.description: In this week’s episode of Build Mode, Isabelle Johannessen talks with Precursor Ventures' Charles Hudson about the headwinds facing early-stage founders today and the most common mistakes founders should avoid in order to get funded.

articles.title: New York Times says OpenAI hid evidence in ChatGPT copyright trial
articles.description: News publishers say OpenAI hid tools and datasets that could identify copyrighted journalism in ChatGPT outputs, escalating their lawsuit with a new motion for sanctions.

articles.description: Slate has an answer for owners who have always want to drive a truck with bright crayon colors.

tech.summary:
今日科技动态摘要

1. **OpenAI发布GPT-5.6模型系列**：OpenAI正式推出新一代模型GPT-5.6，并成为微软Copilot 365的“首选模型”，同时公司二号人物Fidji Simo离职，并关闭AI浏览器项目Atlas，但AI浏览器野心仍在增长。
2. **量子计算与硬件突破**：量子计算初创公司Oratomic融资3亿美元，目标构建仅需2万量子比特的可行量子计算机；同时，有科技博主尝试用iPhone换一部被黑客改造的功能手机。
3. **欧盟与科技巨头监管博弈加剧**：欧盟威胁对Meta旗下Facebook和Instagram的成瘾性功能处以罚款；佛罗里达一名勒索软件谈判员因协助犯罪团伙敲诈美国公司被定罪。
4. **印度智能手机制造新阶段**：继苹果之后，印度智能手机制造进入新阶段，Vivo成立合资公司推动本地化生产。
5. **AI应用与金融创新**：一家AI代理初创公司让自家AI代理完成了1亿美元融资；Meta推出AI编程工具Muse Spark 1.1；两只新ETF明确排除对埃隆·马斯克的投资。

今日最值得关注的发展：**OpenAI正式发布GPT-5.6模型，并成为微软Copilot 365的首选，同时公司高层变动与项目调整，显示AI巨头正加速技术迭代与战略重组。**

ai.summary:
今日AI动态摘要

1. **PyTorch性能优化与推理加速**：Hugging Face发布多篇技术文章，涵盖PyTorch性能分析（“Attention is all you profile”）、vLLM原生速度建模后端、以及通过SkyPilot实现零出站存储的跨云AI工作负载运行，强调推理效率与云原生部署的改进。
2. **AI Agent与模型部署生态扩展**：Hugging Face推出“Data for Agents”数据方案、一键部署至Amazon SageMaker Studio、Foundry托管计算支持，同时Google Gemini API扩展了后台任务与远程MCP的托管Agent功能，推动智能体与基础设施的深度整合。
3. **OpenAI模型迭代与商业应用**：GPT-5.6成为Microsoft 365 Copilot首选模型，并作为“前沿智能”被强调可随用户目标扩展；OpenAI同时发布GPT-5.5生物漏洞赏金计划，并宣布ChatGPT成为“最具雄心的合作伙伴”，凸显其从工具向协作平台的转型。
4. **开源机器人项目与数据战略**：Hugging Face发布LeRobot v0.6.0（聚焦“想象、评估、改进”）、PRX数据策略第四部分，以及🤗 Kernels重大更新，持续推动机器人学习与数据基础设施的开源创新。
5. **行业应用案例**：德国电信（Deutsche Telekom）与OpenAI合作，利用AI重构电信网络运营，展示大模型在垂直行业的实际落地价值。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：OpenAI正式将GPT-5.6定位为“可随用户野心扩展的通用智能”，并深度嵌入Microsoft 365生态，标志着前沿模型从实验性部署向企业级核心工作流的关键跃进。

cctv.summary:
今日新闻联播动态摘要

1. **航天技术突破**：中国首次成功回收可重复使用火箭（长征十号乙），并完成海上火箭助推器回收系统测试，成为继美国后第二个实现轨道级助推器回收的国家，标志着重型可回收火箭技术取得重大进展。
2. **科技与AI领域动态**：Shein获中国批准赴港IPO（第三次上市尝试）；诺贝尔奖得主、美国化学家将移居中国领导AI研究所；中国可能限制外国访问本国开源AI模型；杭州“硅谷”（DeepSeek、阿里巴巴、蚂蚁集团所在地）成为科技焦点。
3. **金融与安全风险**：中国要求各省救助风险较高的区域银行；公共二维码被劫持用于跳转色情与诈骗网站；调查揭示中俄深化军事合作。
4. **国际科技竞争**：OpenAI和Google被曝向被中国列入黑名单的组织销售AI模型，凸显中美科技领域复杂博弈。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：中国首次成功回收可重复使用火箭，标志着航天技术迈向低成本、高频次发射的新阶段，对全球航天竞争格局具有里程碑意义。
